vocab.sentence: Why are you wearing a mask?
He wears a jacket because it is cold.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他因為很冷所以穿著外套。

vocab.sentence: Please wear a mask when you are sick.
I drink water because I am thirsty.
The boy is sick today.
We need some water.
I want a glass of juice.
How much flour do we need?
They need two bags of salt.
This apple pie is yummy.
He is still hungry.
What is this thing?
Please pass me the salt.
I want something to eat.
She puts sugar in her tea.
Where can I get some snacks?
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我可以在哪裡買到點心？

vocab.sentence: I am tired, so I go to sleep.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我很累，所以我去睡覺了。

vocab.sentence: Breakfast is the first meal of the day.
There is a bottle of milk on the table.
The kids like candy very much.
We eat popcorn at the movies.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我們看電影時吃爆米花。

vocab.sentence: Can I have a cup of coffee?
He eats a bowl of soup.
She is making a fruit salad.
We ordered a big pizza.
I want a strawberry milk shake.
There are three cans of cola.
I usually have toast for breakfast.
We need to buy some bread.
This cake is yummy.
The test is very easy.
It is time for a snack.
The kid is playing in the park.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 那個小孩在公園裡玩耍。

vocab.sentence: Mice love cheese.
Put the chicken on the plate.
This is the last piece of pie.
I enjoy listening to music.
Each student has a book.

phrases.sentence: We only need a little salt.
All right, let's go home now.
Please back off from the fire.
The caterpillar turns into a butterfly.

tips.label: 詢問數量 (可數)
tips.text: How many + 可數名詞複數 + are there / 助動詞 + 主詞 + 動詞?

tips.label: 詢問數量 (不可數)
tips.text: How much + 不可數名詞 + is there / 助動詞 + 主詞 + 動詞?

tips.label: 詢問單位量詞
tips.text: How many + 單位量詞複數 + of + 不可數名詞/可數名詞複數 + ...?

tips.label: 因果句型
tips.text: 表結果 + because + 表原因. / 表原因, so + 表結果.

notes.title: 用數量詞或單位量詞表示數量
notes.rule: a little 修飾不可數名詞，a few 修飾可數名詞。
notes.description: 搭配可數名詞：數字 + 單位量詞 + of + 可數名詞複數。搭配不可數名詞：數字 + 單位量詞 + of + 不可數名詞。
examples: There is a little water in the bottle. (瓶子裡面有一點水。)
There are a few cookies in the box. (盒子裡面有一些餅乾。)
a box of cookies (一盒餅乾)
three glasses of juice (三杯果汁)

notes.title: 用 How many 問答可數名詞的數量 (搭配 there be 句型)
notes.rule: How many + 可數名詞複數 + are there (+ 地點)?
notes.description: 在詢問可數名詞的數量時，名詞通常會用複數。
examples: A: How many sandwiches are there on the table? (桌上有多少個三明治？)
B1: There is one sandwich. (有一個三明治。)
B2: There is one. (有一個。)

notes.title: 用 How many 問答可數名詞的數量 (搭配一般動詞)
notes.rule: How many + 可數名詞複數 + 助動詞 + 主詞 + 原形動詞?
notes.description: 答句為主詞 + 一般動詞 + 數字 (+ 名詞) 或 單位量詞。
examples: A: How many apples do you have? (你有多少顆蘋果？)
B: I have three boxes of apples. (我有三箱蘋果。)

notes.title: 用 How much 問答不可數名詞的數量 (搭配 there be 句型)
notes.rule: How much + 不可數名詞 + is there (+ 地點)?
notes.description: 若要表達不可數名詞具體明確的量，要用單位量詞來計數。答句的 be 動詞視單位量詞的單複數決定。
examples: A: How much soup is there in the box? (這箱子裡有多少湯？)
B1: There are two cans of soup. (有兩罐湯。)
B2: There are two cans. (有兩罐。)

notes.title: 用 How much 問答不可數名詞的數量 (搭配一般動詞)
notes.rule: How much + 不可數名詞 + 助動詞 + 主詞 + 原形動詞?
notes.description: 答句為主詞 + 一般動詞 + 數字 + 單位量詞 (+ of + 名詞)。
examples: A: How much salad does she want? (她想要多少沙拉？)
B: She wants a plate of salad. (她想要一盤沙拉。)

notes.title: 詢問單位量詞的數量
notes.rule: 要詢問「多少袋、多少箱」時，要使用 how many。
notes.description: 單位量詞是可數的，和詢問可數名詞的數量一樣，詢問單位量詞的數量時，單位量詞用複數。
examples: A: How many bags of flour are there in the kitchen? (廚房裡有多少袋麵粉？)
B1: There are five bags of flour. (有五袋麵粉。)
B2: There are five bags. (有五袋。)

notes.title: Why 的問答句型
notes.rule: Why + 助動詞 + 主詞 + 原形動詞...?
notes.description: 疑問詞 why 表「為什麼」，用來詢問原因。because 表「因為」，為連接詞，後接「表原因的子句」。
examples: A: Why is Mia going to the park? (米亞為什麼要去公園？)
B: She is going there because there is a concert. (她去那裡是因為有音樂會。)

notes.title: because 和 so 的代換
notes.rule: because、so 都是連接詞，不可同時出現在同一個句子中。
notes.description: 表結果的子句 + because + 表原因的子句 = Because + 表原因的子句, 表結果的子句 = 表原因的子句, so + 表結果的子句。
examples: I don't go out because I am too tired. (因為我太累了，所以我沒有出門。)
Because I am too tired, I don't go out.
I am too tired, so I don't go out.

quiz.question: _______ flour do we need for the cake?
quiz.hint: flour (麵粉) 為不可數名詞，故用 How much。

quiz.question: How many _______ of juice are there on the table?
quiz.hint: How many 後接可數名詞複數，glass 的複數為 glasses。

quiz.question: Harry wears a mask _______ he is sick.
quiz.hint: 說明戴口罩的「原因」，用 because。

quiz.question: I am thirsty. I need a _______ of water.
quiz.hint: 水通常用杯子裝，a glass of water (一杯水)。

quiz.question: There is only _______ milk in the bottle.
quiz.hint: milk 為不可數名詞，只能用 a little (一點點) 修飾。

quiz.question: Mom needs two _______ of salt.
quiz.hint: 數量為 two，單位量詞 bag 需加 s。

quiz.question: _______ apples do you have?
quiz.hint: apples 為可數名詞複數，用 How many 詢問數量。

quiz.question: The kid is crying _______ he is hungry.
quiz.hint: 表原因，用 because。

quiz.question: It is raining, _______ I stay at home.
quiz.hint: 表結果，用 so (所以)。

quiz.question: We have a few _______ in the kitchen.
quiz.hint: a few 只能接可數名詞複數，cookies 為可數。

quiz.question: How much _______ is there in the bowl?
quiz.hint: How much 後面必須接不可數名詞，soup 為不可數。

quiz.question: I want three _______ of pizza.
quiz.hint: 披薩通常用 slice (片) 計算，三片為 three slices。

quiz.question: _______ is she going to the hospital?
quiz.hint: 詢問原因「為什麼」，用 Why。

quiz.question: She didn't eat lunch, _______ she is very hungry now.
quiz.hint: 前句為原因，後句為結果，用 so。

quiz.question: There are two _______ of fruit salad on the table.
quiz.hint: 水果沙拉通常用盤子裝，兩盤為 two plates。

quiz.question: How many _______ of hot chocolate do you want?
quiz.hint: 熱巧克力通常用杯裝，How many 後的單位需用複數 cups。

quiz.question: Are there any _______ in the box?
quiz.hint: Are there 需搭配可數名詞複數，candies 為可數。

quiz.question: I have _______ friends in this city. I am not lonely.
quiz.hint: friends 為可數名詞複數，用 a few (一些)。

quiz.question: He was late _______ he missed the bus.
quiz.hint: 錯過公車是遲到的原因，用 because。

quiz.question: _______ popcorn do they need for the movie?
quiz.hint: popcorn 為不可數名詞，用 How much。

quiz.question: We have two _______ of bread for breakfast.
quiz.hint: 麵包通常用 slice 計算，兩片為 two slices。

quiz.question: There is _______ cheese on the plate.
quiz.hint: cheese 為不可數名詞，用 a little。

quiz.question: Why _______ the boy crying?
quiz.hint: the boy 為第三人稱單數，搭配 be 動詞 is。

quiz.question: Because he is tired, _______ he goes to bed early.
quiz.hint: Because 和 so 不可出現在同一個句子裡，故不填。

quiz.question: How many _______ of flour does the baker need?
quiz.hint: 詢問多少袋，單位量詞需用複數 bags。

quiz.question: I want to buy a _______ of milk.
quiz.hint: 牛奶通常用瓶子裝，a bottle of milk。

quiz.question: How much _______ do you put in your coffee?
quiz.hint: How much 接不可數名詞，sugar (糖) 為不可數。

quiz.question: There are three _______ in the kitchen.
quiz.hint: three 後接可數名詞複數，kids。

quiz.question: He likes fruit, _______ he eats a lot of apples.
quiz.hint: 喜歡水果是原因，吃蘋果是結果，用 so。

quiz.question: Please give me a _______ of pie.
quiz.hint: 派通常用塊 (piece) 來計算。

quiz.question: _______ do you wear a jacket? Because it's cold.
quiz.hint: 答句為 Because，問句必定用 Why 詢問原因。

quiz.question: We need a few _______ to make the salad.
quiz.hint: a few 接可數名詞複數，apples 為可數。

quiz.question: Can I have a _______ of hot tea?
quiz.hint: 熱茶通常用杯子裝，a cup of tea。

quiz.question: How many _______ of orange juice are there?
quiz.hint: How many 後接單位量詞的複數 bottles。

quiz.question: The toast is yummy, _______ I want more.
quiz.hint: 好吃是原因，想多吃是結果，用 so 連接。

quiz.question: There isn't _______ water in the tub.
quiz.hint: water 為不可數名詞，否定句中常用 much 表示「不多」。

quiz.question: I have a little _______ left in my bag.
quiz.hint: a little 修飾不可數名詞，或將 candy 視為不可數的總稱。

quiz.question: Why are you so happy? _______ I got a good grade.
quiz.hint: 回答 Why 的問句，用 Because。

quiz.question: How much _______ does the recipe call for?
quiz.hint: How much 後接不可數名詞，salt 為不可數。

quiz.question: Please back off _______ the dog is angry.
quiz.hint: 狗生氣是請對方退後的原因，用 because。

quiz.question: There is a _______ of soup on the table.
quiz.hint: 湯通常用碗裝，a bowl of soup。

quiz.question: How many _______ do you want to eat?
quiz.hint: How many 後接可數名詞複數，cookies。

quiz.question: She is sad _______ her pet is sick.
quiz.hint: 寵物生病是傷心的原因，用 because。

quiz.question: Let's make a fruit salad. We need some _______ and apples.
quiz.hint: 製作水果沙拉需要水果，bananas 最合理。

quiz.question: He drank three _______ of water after running.
quiz.hint: 三杯水，單位量詞需用複數 glasses。

quiz.question: The box turns _______ a table.
quiz.hint: turn into 為片語，意思是「變成」。

quiz.question: There is a lot of _______ on the pizza.
quiz.hint: cheese 為不可數名詞，不加 s。

quiz.question: I don't have enough money, _______ I can't buy the toy.
quiz.hint: 錢不夠是原因，無法買是結果，用 so。

quiz.question: How much _______ does he need for his coffee?
quiz.hint: 咖啡通常加牛奶，且 milk 為不可數名詞。

quiz.question: We need a _______ of bread to make a sandwich.
quiz.hint: 做三明治通常需要切片的麵包，a slice of bread。

All right, let's go home now.

grammar.sentence: How much flour do you need?
We need a little milk.
How many apples are there on the table?
There are three boxes of apples.
Why is he wearing a mask?
He is wearing a mask because he is sick.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他戴著口罩因為他生病了。

grammar.sentence: I have a few cookies in the box.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我的盒子裡有一些餅乾。

grammar.sentence: How much soup is there in the bowl?
There are two cans of soup.
She wants a plate of fruit salad.
How many glasses of water do we need?
We need four glasses of water.
Because I am sick, I am wearing a mask.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 因為我生病了，所以我戴口罩。

grammar.sentence: I am sick, so I am wearing a mask.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我生病了，所以我戴口罩。

grammar.sentence: How many bags of flour are there in the kitchen?
There is only one can of tea.
How much juice is there in the bottle?
There are five slices of pizza on the table.
How many cups of coffee does your friend drink?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 你的朋友喝多少杯咖啡？

grammar.sentence: Why are you going to the park?
I am going there because there is a concert.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我去那裡是因為有音樂會。

grammar.sentence: I am too tired, so I don't go out.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 我太累了，所以我沒出門。

grammar.sentence: Because I am too tired, I don't go out.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 因為我太累了，所以我沒出門。

grammar.sentence: We want two tubs of popcorn.
How many sandwiches are there on the desk?
grammar.sentence_chinese: 書桌上有多少個三明治？

grammar.sentence: There is a little water in the glass.
The kids like the teacher because she is nice.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 孩子們喜歡老師因為她很好。

grammar.sentence: Peter isn't eating because he is not hungry.
grammar.sentence_chinese: Peter 沒有吃因為他不餓。

grammar.sentence: Please put a little sugar in the coffee.
He always has a bowl of fruit salad with his meal.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他用餐時總會配一碗水果沙拉。
